title: Membership Tier Benefit
description: Benefits associated with a membership tier.

id.description: Unique identifier for the tier benefit.

title.description: Short label-like summary of the benefit (e.g. “Free shipping”).

description.description: Detailed complete explanation of the benefit (e.g. “Complimentary standard shipping on all orders”).

applies_on.description: JSONPath to the eligible benefit target represented by a discount (e.g. `$.discounts.applied[0]`).
